stemHtml: If you are using the call sign G-IICD and there is another station using the call sign G-ZYCD on the same frequency, ATC will...

options.a: abbreviate the call signs at the controller`s discretion.
options.b: use the full call signs, as abbreviating this type of call sign is impossible.
options.c: abbreviate your call sign to G-CD.
options.d: use the full call signs to avoid any possible confusion.
